# Personal Information

## Identity
**Name:** Your Name
**Location:** City, State
**Work Preference:** Remote-friendly (open to hybrid/onsite depending on role)

## Industry Openness
Brief statement about what industries you're open to and why your skills are transferable.

## Professional Headline (resume-ready)
One-sentence headline summarizing your specialization and value proposition.

## Contact
- **Phone:** (555) 555-5555
- **Email:** you@example.com
- **LinkedIn:** https://linkedin.com/in/yourprofile

## Summary Blurb (for cover letters)
2–3 sentence summary of your background, key skills, and what you bring to a new role. Used as the opening paragraph in cover letters.

## Optional Variants (tone controls)

**Neutral / cross-industry:**
A broader version of your headline for non-industry-specific applications.

**More technical:**
A version that leads with tools, technologies, or technical depth.

## Notes (not for resumes)
- Any preferences, constraints, or context Claude should know but that shouldn't appear in documents
- Examples: open to relocation, preferred team size, comp expectations
